title: isocoma tridentata
intro: Isocoma tridentata, also known as Bigelow's scalebush or Bigelow's yellowbrush, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. Its leaves, roots, and stems are used in traditional medicine, with medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health. Isocoma tridentata is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
